auth.name: Display name
auth.welcomeDescRegister: Join to start tracking your flow sessions and analytics.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track sessions, flow time, and signal quality at a glance.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Search and inspect every recorded focus block.

sessionDetail.title: Session Detail
sessionDetail.subtitle: Timeline, STR, and annotations for this session.

trends.title: Trends
trends.subtitle: Compare flow performance by task type and time.

compare.title: Compare
compare.subtitle: Place two sessions side by side to spot deltas.

sessions.newSessionSubtitle: Create a new flow session with date, time and notes.
sessions.warehouseDesc: A more data-dense view of every sample. Filters, search, and operational labels.
sessions.searchPlaceholder: Search by task, note, or date
sessions.filteredResultsDesc: Rows currently matching the query and task constraint.
sessions.avgQualityDesc: Average signal completeness for the current result set.
sessions.avgSTRDescFiltered: Average flow ratio across the filtered subset.
sessions.avgSTRDescFilteredWithPercent: Average flow ratio {{percent}}% across the filtered subset.
sessions.noSessionsMatch: No sessions match the active filters.
sessions.noSessionsHint: Try clearing the search term or switching task categories.
sessions.flowTimeDesc: of the session stayed in high-immersion states.
sessions.avgSTRDescDetail: Primary measure of subjective time compression or drag.
sessions.qualityScoreDesc: Sensor integrity estimate derived from eye, EEG, and HR channels.
sessions.longestStreakDesc: Longest uninterrupted stretch of stable focus.
sessions.strSubtitle: The closer the line sits below 1.0, the stronger the subjective compression of time during the task.
sessions.annotationsDesc: A placeholder interface for qualitative tags before the backend annotation API exists.

dashboard.headline: High-signal session intelligence
dashboard.headlineDesc: A denser home view designed for analytics work: headline KPIs, short-term flow movement, curated insights, and quick drill-down into recent sessions.
dashboard.lastSessionDesc: Latest sync-ready record available in the mock dataset.
dashboard.flowTimeDescMetric: Recovered deep-focus time from the most recent session.
dashboard.avgSTRDescMetric: Lower values imply time compression and stronger immersion.
dashboard.totalSessionsDesc: Tracked samples currently available to the frontend.
dashboard.weeklyFlowDesc: Cumulative high-focus minutes across the current week.
dashboard.weeklySTRDesc: Weekly baseline for cognitive pacing and subjective time.
dashboard.longestStreakDesc: Most stable uninterrupted flow block in the latest session.
dashboard.insightTotalFlow: Total flow time this week: {{min}} min

settings.configDesc: This page uses typed form state and is ready for future API-driven persistence.
settings.qualityThresholdDesc: Lower thresholds admit noisier sessions, while higher thresholds favor cleaner but fewer records.
settings.conservativeDesc: Higher precision and fewer flow detections; best for stricter review workflows.
settings.balancedDesc: A middle ground tuned for general-purpose analysis and mock-demo readability.
settings.aggressiveDesc: More flow detections with higher false-positive risk; useful for exploration.
settings.cloudSyncDesc: Prepare settings for future account-backed storage.
settings.localOnlyDesc: Keep session artifacts constrained to the device until backend integration exists.
settings.anonModelDesc: Reserve a switch for future opt-in model training workflows.
settings.formSnapshotDesc: This panel reflects the payload persisted in local storage.

compare.title: Side-by-side session diagnostics
compare.description: Choose two sessions, then scan their flow timeline, STR movement, and delta metrics.
compare.flowDeltaDesc: Difference in flow ratio between the two selected sessions.
compare.strDeltaDesc: Difference in average subjective time rate.
compare.qualityDeltaDesc: Difference in sensor integrity across the selected pair.

trends.title: Cross-session trends
trends.description: Summary KPIs at the top and chart panels below to support pattern finding.
trends.totalSessionsDesc: Total mock records available for analysis.
trends.avgFlowRatioDesc: Overall percent of time spent in focused or flow states.
trends.bestTaskDesc: Task category with the strongest flow performance signal.

strChart.title: STR curve
strChart.defaultSubtitle: Below 1.0 suggests accelerated time perception associated with flow.

calendar.eachDayShows: Each day shows total deep-focus time recorded.
